episodes.title: Chuck Schumer reacts to Donald Trump, Epstein files before State of the Union speech: 'Shame on him'
episodes.description:
Sen. Chuck Schumer spoke at a press conference with survivors of convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein on Feb. 24. Schumer talked about President Donald Trump's upcoming State of the Union address and more.

More: https://www.palmbeachpost.com/story/news/politics/2026/02/23/dani-bensky-jeffrey-epstein-trump-state-of-union/88830677007/

episodes.title: Live: Epstein survivors join Democrats at press conference ahead Trump's State of Union address
episodes.description: Democratic members of Congress are joined by Epstein survivors for a news conference ahead of the State of the Union address.

episodes.title: Epstein victims attorney, accuser speak out on vote to release Epstein files: Full press conference
episodes.description:
Attorney Gloria Allred and her client, alleged Epstein victim Alicia Arden, held a press conference a day before the House vote that would prompt the Justice Department to release all of its records on disgraced financier and convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

Trump reversed his position and gave his party permission to back the bill he spent months trying to bury and allegedlly broke with a one-time ally over.
